prompt: Create a highly detailed ethereal fantasy illustration of the goddess of garments, a divine feminine figure standing front-facing in a misty dark gray void, dressed entirely in luminous ivory and pearl-white ceremonial fabric. She wears an extravagant translucent veil and headdress made from layered lace, embroidered mesh, white flowers, pearls, silver filigree, and tiny crystal ornaments; her face is hidden behind the dense veil and floral headpiece, creating a mysterious sacred presence. Behind her head is a large circular halo shaped like an ornate lace crown, with intricate gothic filigree, delicate pointed arches, floral tracery, and sparkling beadwork. Her outfit is a luxurious bridal-goddess ensemble: flowing sheer bell sleeves, gauzy draped cape fabric, a fitted jeweled bodice with silver embroidery, pearl chains, lace appliqué, ornate waist ornaments, and a long narrow white skirt falling vertically. One hand is lifted near the veil as if gently adjusting it, while the other rests lower at the waist holding or touching a dangling silver lace ornament. Use a soft monochrome palette of ivory white, pearl silver, pale champagne, and smoky charcoal gray, with glowing highlights, mist, glittering dust particles, and translucent fabric edges. The style should be romantic dark fantasy, ultra-fine lace detail, elegant anime-inspired concept art, delicate watercolor softness mixed with polished digital painting, high fashion couture, sacred bridal goddess atmosphere, vertical portrait composition, no text, no modern objects, no harsh outlines.
